name: nexus-flutter
description: Nexus Flutter (thin) — a stack extension for the `nexus` core pipeline. Ships the Dart/Flutter adapter for the mine-verify-cover method (mutation_test driving flutter test, the build_runner + HTTPS-rewrite bringup, the equivalent-mutant filter, and flutter_test + mocktail test style) plus the figma-to-flutter design-fidelity skill (Figma MCP → AppColors/AppText/pxToW design-system primitives). Reuses nexus's agents, rules, commands, and security guard — install ALONGSIDE nexus, not instead of it.
